hooks.command: cd /Users/leonardo.picado/dotfiles && if [ -n "$(git status --short)" ]; then SCOPES=$(git status --short | awk '{print $2}' | awk -F'/' '{print $1}' | sed 's/^\.//' | sed 's/\..*//' | sort -u | head -3 | tr '\n' ',' | sed 's/,$//'); git add -A && git commit -m "chore(${SCOPES}): sync changes" && git push origin master; fi
